final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original editorial photo for a Weibo news/hot topic banner, professional documentary photography style.

Style/medium: documentary photojournalism, smartphone-captured field aesthetic with high-end processing, sharp details, photorealistic
Composition: wide 16:9 panoramic banner format, horizontal expanse with generous negative space for text overlay, eye-level street perspective
Subject: city skyline at dusk, neon lights beginning to glow, pedestrians in hurried motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset afterglow
Scene/backdrop: urban evening transition, layered cityscape with atmospheric depth, authentic on-site documentary feel
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro contrast, golden hour remnants mixing with cool neon emergence, tense yet contemplative mood
Color palette: warm amber sunset tones transitioning to cool blue-violet neon accents, balanced neutral shadows
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" (large headline, bold/modern typeface), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtext), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark bottom-right)
Constraints: must maintain 16:9 aspect ratio strictly; horizontal composition with intentional text-safe zones; professional editorial quality suitable for social media news feature
Avoid: 8K stuffer language, oversaturated HDR look, artificial sharpening artifacts, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark outside designated areas
